text: the thought-forms and emotions into itself like a big light-magnet. As to the mood, it seemed very tense. These beings were clearly banded together for some purpose and they were not messing around. They were very tightly knit, very sharp; they all knew their place and their task, and they were fully on it with zealous fervor. I then saw that these beings had a caste-like system—a hierarchy. Some of the beings were collectors, others were specialists, one was a shrine keeper, and then there were also shrine guardians (who weren’t any bigger, like bouncers, but just seemed really nasty and powerful). It oddly reminded me of a mafia-like social structure, only somewhat Japanese and, of course, nonhuman and in the astral plane. The shrines were clearly nexus points, and this was but one of many—how many I wasn’t sure. These beings were clearly very connected; they were like rich, smooth, green, gangster yakuzas with built-in telepa-phones and astral martial-arts skills. Then I saw I was approaching one of the hills, and the green color shifted to mostly white as I approached it. This was the astral body of the plant-being, and it looked almost nothing like its physical form. The hills had millions of these plants as far as the eye could see. They were roughly the same size and shape as the physical plant, but they were not really plants at all. They were plant-shaped crystals here! Wild! They were pulsing together like a set of Broadway lights that blink in succession to give the appearance of motion. It was like they were communicating. The other thing I noticed was that there were colors moving in the plants—emotions! It looked like a Kirlian photograph. UNDERWORLD WORKINGS Suddenly it dawned on me: these plants were transmitters! Wait, more than that. There must be crystals in the physical plant that act as multidimensional gateways for these beings. Resins , of course! There are crystals! First, the way that they must work is as follows: when you inhale smoke, the plant crystals (resins) are in an excited state, that is, they are activated by fire. Burning crystal smoke becomes a conductive medium, similar to the way in which, if you squeeze a crystal, you can get a spark of electricity (the piezoelectric effect). Imagine thousands of tiny crystals bursting into flames at once. If that doesn’t create a portal or intense effect on the space around it, I don’t know what does. Second, once the resin crystals become connected to the host’s body (activated by fire or not) they can transmit gifts and influence from their world. Once in the body, these specialized crystals transmit the plant’s physical signal, anchoring the influence of the plant and the shrine network directly. Then it becomes easier for the people of the leaf to make their shrewd deals and transactions. In other words, once the crystals are activated by fire, the smoke is a portal for transit and information. A little-green-men transporter device! Once the resin is in the body, the physical plant spirit itself also begins to influence the imbiber. Once there is enough smoke, or “fire-activated crystal medium,” the little green people can then “hold an intention” and do that jumping, twisty-leap thing, and “spiral out” to accelerate through the medium in their astral bodies to the proper location in the astral plane, where they deposit their merchandise into the light shrine. The “intention” is like a course heading. They imagine where they want to go, and to raise their vibration slightly they jump upward in a spiral, and then—poof—their astral body changes into an electrical state, and then they are conducted to where they intended along the “smoke highway.” Of course! How could I have missed that! My mind was reeling. I know from working on clients doing energy work and shamanic healing that various entities are always trying to find a way to affect the physical world. This is how these entities do it—through growing special transmitter crystals that are designed to interact with the human brain in a way that could influence our behavior. Every shaman knows that one of the biggest priorities for any nonphysical being is to find a way into the physical dimension or to somehow influence it through us. And every shaman also knows that crystals are multidimensional transmitters. This has really profound and disturbing implications. I believe that many people’s actions are being nudged by, if not strongly influenced by, the beings of this green underworld. Perhaps unknowingly they regularly trade their feelings and thoughts and much of their will and directive for the “blessing” of emotional/mental numbness and the psychic connection to others who have crystal-implant “cell phones” from the same plant and the same frequency. (That is, the same bud, plant, or crop resonance.) Further benefits are subconscious connection to the thoughts and feelings of every being on that shrine network. The light shrines are all on power points in the astral world that connect together like a ley line grid in the physical earth frequency. You could take one bud from this plant from Seattle, break it in half and give one part of it to your friend, who will stay in Seattle while you are going to Australia. Then, let’s say that you both make an agreement to light up at the same time—on the full moon, for instance. You both imbibe a fresh supply of crystals from the same bud. For you in Australia, this refreshes the portal to the green-underworld network in Seattle and instantly somehow you “just know” how people in Sea-town are feeling, and what they are thinking, and generally what is going on. Also, you would have a particularly strong connection to the person who has the other half, or any bud from the same plant or crop. How convenient! How seductive!
